BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: WILDLIFE ASSOCIATION OF TEXAS DBA TEXAS

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: THE TEXAS WILDLIFE ASSOCIATION'S(TWA) MISSION IS SERVING TEXAS WILDLIFE AND ITS HABITAT WHILE PROTECTING PROPERTY RIGHTS, HUNTING HERITAGE, AND THE CONSERVATION EFFORTS OF THOSE WHO VALUE AND STEWARD WILDLIFE RESOURCES.TO SUPPORT OUR MISSION, THE TEXAS WILDLIFE ASSOCIATION:1)DISSEMINATES INFORMATIVE AND EDUCATIONAL MATERIAL ON WILDLIFE, LEGISLATIVE ISSUES, REGULATORY MATTERS, SCIENTIFIC FINDINGS, MANAGEMENT TECHNIQUES AND MEMBER NEWS THROUGH A MONTHLY MAGAZINE, TEXAS WILDLIFE, AND THROUGH SPECIAL MAILINGS, ELECTRONIC MEDIA, EXHIBITS, AND PRODUCTIONS.2)COOPERATES WITH OUR FRIENDS AT THE TEXAS WILDLIFE ASSOCIATION FOUNDATION, INC TO ENCOURAGE THE PARTICIPATION OF ALL AGES IN OUTDOOR EDUCATION, HUNTING, FISHING AND WILDLIFE-ORIENTED ACTIVITIES THROUGH ORGANIZED YOUTH HUNTS, ECOLOGY CAMPS, 4-H ENRICHMENT PROGRAMS, SCHOOL-BASED PROGRAMS AND TRAININGS, FIELD TRIPS, AND OTHER RELATED EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS.3) ADMINISTERS THE TEXAS YOUTH HUNTING PROGRAM (IN CONJUCTION WITH THE TEXAS PARKS AND WI
IRS990.MissionDesc: THE TEXAS WILDLIFE ASSOCIATION'S(TWA) MISSION IS SERVING TEXAS WILDLIFE AND ITS HABITAT WHILE PROTECTING PROPERTY RIGHTS, HUNTING HERITAGE, AND THE CONSERVATION EFFORTS OF THOSE WHO VALUE AND STEWARD WILDLIFE RESOURCES.TO SUPPORT OUR MISSION, THE TEXAS WILDLIFE ASSOCIATION:1)DISSEMINATES INFORMATIVE AND EDUCATIONAL MATERIAL ON WILDLIFE, LEGISLATIVE ISSUES, REGULATORY MATTERS, SCIENTIFIC FINDINGS, MANAGEMENT TECHNIQUES AND MEMBER NEWS THROUGH A MONTHLY MAGAZINE, TEXAS WILDLIFE, AND THROUGH SPECIAL MAILINGS, ELECTRONIC MEDIA, EXHIBITS, AND PRODUCTIONS.2)COOPERATES WITH OUR FRIENDS AT THE TEXAS WILDLIFE ASSOCIATION FOUNDATION, INC TO ENCOURAGE THE PARTICIPATION OF ALL AGES IN OUTDOOR EDUCATION, HUNTING, FISHING AND WILDLIFE-ORIENTED ACTIVITIES THROUGH ORGANIZED YOUTH HUNTS, ECOLOGY CAMPS, 4-H ENRICHMENT PROGRAMS, SCHOOL-BASED PROGRAMS AND TRAININGS, FIELD TRIPS, AND OTHER RELATED EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS.3) ADMINISTERS THE TEXAS YOUTH HUNTING PROGRAM (IN CONJUCTION WITH THE TEXAS PARKS AND WI
IRS990.Desc: ADVOCATES FOR THE BENEFIT OF WILDLIFE AND FOR THE RIGHTS OF WILDLIFE MANAGERS, LANDOWNERS, AND SPORTSMEN IN EDUCATIONAL, SCIENTIFIC, POLITICAL, REGULATORY, LEGAL & LEGISLATIVE ARENAS. ACTIVITIES INCLUDE SEVERAL FIELD DAYS, 3 TEXAS BIG GAME AWARDS BANQUETS, 1 STATEWIDE BANQUET, 194 YOUTH HUNTS, 6 HUNTSMASTER TRAININGS, 934 EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS, AMONG OTHERS.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: MONITOR PROCEEDINGS OF THE LEGISLATURE AND ITS COMMITTEES, THE TEXAS PARKS & WILDLIFE DEPT. AND OTHER STATE & LOCAL AGENCIES ON MATTERS AFFECTING WILDLIFE AND THE EDUCATION OF YOUTH IN WILDLIFE CAUSES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Part I-A, Line 1 - Direct and Indirect Political Campaign Activities
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MAINTAINS A PERMANENT LEGISLATIVE LIAISON AND ENGAGES IN PROCEEDINGS OF THE STATE AND NATIONAL LEGISLATURE AND THEIR COMMITTEES, OF THE TEXAS PARKS AND WILDLIFE DEPARTMENT AND STATE AND FEDERAL AGENCIES ON MATTERS AFFECTING THE INTERESTS OF OUR MEMBERS, AND TESTIFIES WHENEVER APPLICABLE IN SUPPORT OF THESE INTERESTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Part XI, Line 2d: Other revenue amounts included in F/S but not included on form 990
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: COST OF GOODS SOLD-MERCHANDISE $22486 DIRECT EXPENSES-FUNDRAISING $336858

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Part XII, Line 2d: Other expenses and losses per audited F/S
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: COST OF GOODS SOLD-MERCHANDISE $22486 DIRECT EXPENSES-FUNDRAISING $336858

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Grantmaker's Description of How Grants are Used
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MONITORS THE USE OF GRANT FUNDS IN THE UNITED STATES BY RECEIVING AND REVIEWING APPLICATIONS FOR SELECTION, AS WELL AS WRITING CHECKS DIRECTLY TO THE APPROPRIATE UNIVERSITY TO ENSURE THAT SUCH GRANTS ARE USED FOR PROPER PURPOSES AND ARE NOT OTHERWISE DIVERTED FROM THE INTENDED USE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section A, Line 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: E A CHRISTY IS AN OWNER OF TRIANGLE REPRODUCTIONS OF SAN ANTONIO WHICH PROVIDES PRINTING SERVICES TO THE ORGANIZATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 11b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FORM 990 WAS REVIEWED IN DETAIL BY THE CEO, DIRECTOR OF FINANCE, TREASURER, AND FINANCE COMMITTEE. THEN COPIES OF THE FINAL VERSION WERE PROVIDED TO THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS VIA EMAIL PRIOR TO THE FILING WITH THE IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 12c
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: EACH YEAR, NEW BOARD MEMBERS SIGN A CONFLICT OF INTEREST STATEMENT. WE HAVE SUCH STATEMENTS SIGNED BY EVERY MEMBER OF THE BOARD. IF THERE IS A CONFLICT OF INTEREST, THE BOARD IS MADE AWARE OF THIS AND THE BOARD MEMBER INVOLVED DOES NOT SPEAK OR VOTE ON THOSE RELATED ISSUES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 15a
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE PROCESS FOR DETERMINING COMPENSATION FOR THE ORGANIZATION'S CEO, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR, AND TOP MANAGEMENT OFFICAL INCLUDED A REVIEW AND APPROVAL BY THE OFFICERS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section C, Line 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MAKES ITS GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC BY REQUEST(WRITTEN OR ORAL).

DisregardedEntityName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: THE FOREVER FOUND FOR TX WILDLIFE

OtherOrganizationName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: THE FOREVER FOUND FOR TX WILDLIFE
THE FOREVER FOUND FOR TX WILDLIFE
THE FOREVER FOUND FOR TX WILDLIFE
